uz.how.s1_desc: O'quvchi sifatida profilingizni yarating. Ism, yosh, o'qish joyi va maqsadlaringizni kiriting.
uz.how.s2_desc: IELTS, SAT, Admission yoki Grants bo'yicha viloyatingizdan yoki boshqa viloyatdan mentor tanlang.
uz.how.s3_desc: Tarifni tanlang (Premium/Admission/Grants) yoki bepul konsultatsiya jadvaliga yoziling.
uz.how.s4_desc: Mentor bilan ishlang, maqsad ballingizga erishing.

uz.free.desc: Bepul konsultatsiyalar jadval bo'yicha e'lon qilinadi. Zoom yoki Google Meet orqali — sayt ichida live video yo'q.

uz.footer.desc: O'zbekistonning har bir viloyatidagi eng yaxshi IELTS, SAT va Admission Programme mentorlarini bog'lovchi platforma.
uz.page.mentors_sub: O'zbekistonning barcha viloyatlaridan tasdiqlangan IELTS, SAT va Admission Programme mentorlari
uz.free_page.title: Bepul IELTS va SAT konsultatsiyasi
uz.free_page.desc: Bepul konsultatsiyalar jadval bo'yicha e'lon qilinadi. Darslar Zoom yoki Google Meet orqali bo'ladi — sayt ichida live video yo'q.
uz.free_page.cta_desc: Bepul konsultatsiya o'tkazib, o'z brend va nomingizni yarating.
uz.free_page.empty_desc: Tez orada yangi bepul konsultatsiyalar e'lon qilinadi.
uz.admission.hero_desc: Universitet tanlash, application strategy, essaylar, hujjatlar, deadline va submit — hammasini birga qilamiz. Visa va turar joy masalalaridan tashqari.
uz.admission.step1_desc: GPA, faoliyat, maqsad, budjet va deadline’lar bo‘yicha start nuqtani aniqlaymiz.
uz.admission.step2_desc: Reach/Match/Safety asosida ro‘yxat + requirement va timeline’ni tuzamiz.
uz.admission.step3_desc: Personal statement, short answers, CV/resume, recommendation bo‘yicha guidance va edit.
uz.admission.step4_desc: Form’larni to‘ldirish, checklist, final review va submit (visa/turar joy kirmaydi).
uz.admission.inc1_desc: Yo‘nalish, target universitetlar, deadline va checklist.
uz.admission.contact_desc: 1.5 hafta ichida 4 ta sessiya (1.5 soatdan). Maqsad: arizani to‘g‘ri yopish va submit qilish.
uz.admission.contact_note: Eslatma: visa va turar joy masalalari paketga kirmaydi.
uz.grants.hero_desc: YYGS, Lumiere Research, LaunchX kabi programlar uchun portfolio, essaylar, activity plan va application’ni birga tayyorlaymiz. Maqsad: kuchli profil + deadline’larni to‘g‘ri yopish.
uz.grants.step1_desc: Qaysi program(lar): YYGS, Lumiere Research, LaunchX va boshqalar — profilingizga mosini tanlaymiz.
uz.grants.step2_desc: Activity reja, project/portfolio, resume va pozitsioning — kuchli ko‘rinish uchun.
uz.grants.step3_desc: Essay javoblari, short answers, recommendation’lar bo‘yicha guidance va tahrir.
uz.grants.step4_desc: Form’larni to‘ldirish, checklist, deadline nazorati va yakuniy review — submitgacha.
uz.grants.inc1_desc: Timeline, requirement tahlil, kuchli tomonlaringizga mos yo‘l xaritasi.
uz.grants.inc2_desc: Project g‘oyalar, research/impact yo‘nalishi, natija ko‘rsatish formatlari.
uz.grants.inc3_desc: Structure, storytelling, clarity — draft’lardan final’gacha edit.
uz.grants.inc4_desc: Har bir qadam bo‘yicha checklist, form’larni tekshirish va submitga tayyorlash.
uz.grants.inc5_desc: Agar kerak bo‘lsa: mock interview va “Why you?” qismini kuchaytirish.
uz.grants.inc6_desc: Jarayon davomida savol-javob va feedback: mentor bilan tezkor aloqa.
uz.grants.contact_desc: Maqsadni aniqlab olamiz, program tanlaymiz va submitgacha barcha bosqichlarni birga yopamiz. Sizda allaqachon program bo‘lsa ham, shu program’ga moslab ishlaymiz.
uz.mentor_reg.title: Mentor bo'lish
uz.mentor_reg.notice: Mentor profilingiz admin tomonidan tekshiriladi. Har bir viloyatdan mentorlar qabul qilinadi.
uz.mentor_reg.q3: O'quvchilaringizdagi eng katta muvaffaqiyat qanday bo'lgan?
uz.student_reg.title: O'quvchi bo'lish
uz.student_reg.sub: Top mentorlar bilan IELTS, SAT va Admission Programme bo'yicha tayyorlaning
uz.ielts.title: IELTS bandini 6.5+ qilaylik
uz.ielts.desc: O'zbekistonning barcha viloyatlaridan tasdiqlangan IELTS mentorlari. Haftada 3 ta konsultatsiya, 1.5 soatdan.
uz.ielts.cta_desc: Haftada 3 ta konsultatsiya bilan 4–6 oy ichida maqsad bandingizga erishing
uz.sat.title: SAT da 1400+ olaylik
uz.sat.desc: O'zbekistonning barcha viloyatlaridan tasdiqlangan SAT mentorlari. Haftada 3 ta konsultatsiya, 1.5 soatdan.
uz.sat.cta_desc: Haftada 3 ta konsultatsiya bilan 4–6 oy ichida maqsad ballingizga erishing
uz.profil.free_desc: Bu mentor 1 soatlik bepul konsultatsiya o'tkazadi.
uz.profil.free_student_desc: Bepul IELTS va SAT konsultatsiyalariga qatnashing!
uz.course.schedule_desc: Haftada 3 ta konsultatsiya, har biri 1.5 soatdan. Online formatda, qulay vaqtda mentor bilan kelishiladi.
uz.course.price_desc: 1 hafta — 150,000 so'm. Istalgan vaqt to'xtatish mumkin.
uz.ielts.learn_desc: Listening, Reading, Writing, Speaking — IELTS ning barcha 4 bo'limi.
uz.ielts.bands_desc: Academic va General Training uchun ball tizimi
uz.ielts.faq_q1: IELTS Academic va General farqi nima?
uz.ielts.faq_a1: Academic — universitet uchun (Reading va Writing qiyinroq). General Training — ish/immigratsiya uchun (Writing osonroq). Ikkalasida Listening va Speaking bir xil.
uz.ielts.faq_a2: 0 dan boshlasangiz 6–12 oy. Intermediate darajada 3–6 oy. Har haftada 3 ta dars bilan 4–6 oy ichida 6.5–7.0 olish mumkin.
uz.ielts.faq_a3: Toshkent, Samarqand, Buxoro, Farg'ona va boshqa shaharlarda British Council va IDP markazlarida topshirish mumkin.
uz.ielts.faq_a4: O'zbekistonda IELTS imtihoni taxminan $200–220 atrofida. British Council va IDP orqali ro'yxatdan o'tish mumkin.
uz.sat.learn_desc: Math va EBRW (Reading, Writing) — SAT ning barcha bo'limlari.
uz.sat.faq_q1: Digital SAT PSAT dan farqi nima?
uz.sat.faq_a1: SAT — asosiy imtihon (max 1600). PSAT — SAT ga tayyorgarlik imtihoni (max 1520). PSAT National Merit stipendiyasiga yo'l ochadi.
uz.sat.faq_a2: Maqsadga qarab 3–9 oy. 1200 dan 1400 ga chiqish uchun ~4–5 oy intensiv tayyorgarlik. Haftada 3 ta dars yetarli.
uz.sat.faq_a3: Ha. Toshkentdagi College Board akkreditatsiya qilingan markazlarda topshirish mumkin. Yiliga bir necha marta o'tkaziladi.
uz.sat.faq_a4: Cheklanmagan. Ko'pchilik 2–3 marta topshiradi. College Board "Score Choice" orqali eng yaxshi natijani yuborish mumkin.
uz.profil.subject: Yo'nalish
uz.form.questions_hint: Ushbu savollarga to'liq javob bering — o'quvchilar profilingizda ko'radi.

en.ielts.desc: Verified IELTS mentors from all regions of Uzbekistan. 3 consultations per week, 1.5 hours each.
en.ielts.cta_desc: Reach your target band in 4–6 months with 3 consultations per week
en.sat.title: Let's score 1400+ on SAT

en.sat.cta_desc: Reach your target score in 4–6 months with 3 consultations per week
en.profil.free_desc: This mentor holds a free 1-hour consultation.
en.profil.no_courses: You haven't enrolled in any consultation yet.
en.profil.free_student_desc: Join free IELTS and SAT consultations!
en.course.schedule_desc: 3 consultations per week, 1.5 hours each. Online, at a convenient time agreed with mentor.
en.ielts.learn_desc: Listening, Reading, Writing, Speaking — all 4 IELTS sections.
en.ielts.bands_desc: Score system for Academic and General Training
en.ielts.faq_q1: What is the difference between IELTS Academic and General?
en.ielts.faq_a1: Academic is for university admissions (harder Reading/Writing). General Training is for work/immigration (easier Writing). Listening and Speaking are the same for both.
en.ielts.faq_a2: From scratch: 6–12 months. Intermediate: 3–6 months. With 3 sessions per week, you can often reach 6.5–7.0 in 4–6 months.
en.ielts.faq_q3: Where can I take the exam?
en.ielts.faq_a3: You can take IELTS in Tashkent, Samarkand, Bukhara, Fergana and other cities at British Council and IDP test centers.
en.ielts.faq_q4: How much does the exam cost?
en.ielts.faq_a4: In Uzbekistan, IELTS costs roughly $200–220. You can register via British Council or IDP.
en.sat.learn_desc: Math and EBRW (Reading, Writing) — all SAT sections.
en.sat.faq_q1: What's the difference between Digital SAT and PSAT?
en.sat.faq_a1: SAT is the main exam (max 1600). PSAT is a practice exam (max 1520). PSAT can lead to National Merit scholarships.
en.sat.faq_a2: Depending on your goal: 3–9 months. Going from 1200 to 1400 often takes ~4–5 months of intensive prep. 3 sessions per week is enough for many students.
en.sat.faq_q3: Can I take SAT in Uzbekistan?
en.sat.faq_a3: Yes. You can take it at College Board–approved test centers in Tashkent. It's offered several times per year.
en.sat.faq_q4: How many times can I take the SAT?
en.sat.faq_a4: There's no limit. Many students take it 2–3 times. With Score Choice, you can send your best result.
en.profil.subject: Subject
en.form.questions_hint: Answer fully — students will see this on your profile.

ru.admission.step3_desc: Personal statement, short answers, CV/resume и рекомендации — guidance + правки.

ru.grants.step2_desc: План активностей, проекты/портфолио, резюме и позиционирование.
ru.grants.step3_desc: Эссе, short answers, рекомендации — guidance и правки.
ru.grants.step4_desc: Заполнение форм, чеклист, контроль дедлайнов и финальный review — до submit.
ru.grants.inc2_desc: Идеи проектов, research/impact направление и показ результатов.
ru.grants.inc3_desc: Структура, storytelling, ясность — от drafts до финала.

ru.grants.inc6_desc: Вопросы-ответы и быстрый фидбек по ходу процесса.
ru.grants.contact_desc: Определяем цель, выбираем программы и закрываем все этапы вместе до submit. Если программа уже есть — работаем под неё.

ru.ielts.desc: Проверенные IELTS менторы из всех регионов Узбекистана. 3 консультации в неделю по 1.5 часа.
ru.ielts.cta_desc: Достигните целевого балла за 4–6 месяцев с 3 консультациями в неделю
ru.sat.title: Давайте наберём 1400+ на SAT
ru.sat.desc: Проверенные SAT менторы из всех регионов Узбекистана. 3 консультации в неделю по 1.5 часа.
ru.sat.cta_desc: Достигните целевого балла за 4–6 месяцев с 3 консультациями в неделю
ru.profil.no_courses: Вы ещё не записались ни на одну консультацию.
ru.profil.free_student_desc: Посещайте бесплатные консультации по IELTS и SAT!
ru.course.schedule_desc: 3 консультации в неделю по 1.5 часа. Онлайн, в удобное время, согласованное с ментором.
ru.course.price_desc: 1 неделя — 150 000 сум. Можно отменить в любое время.
ru.ielts.learn_desc: Listening, Reading, Writing, Speaking — все 4 раздела IELTS.
ru.ielts.bands_desc: Система баллов для Academic и General Training
ru.ielts.faq_q1: В чём разница между IELTS Academic и General?
ru.ielts.faq_a1: Academic — для поступления в университет (сложнее Reading/Writing). General Training — для работы/иммиграции (проще Writing). Listening и Speaking одинаковые в обоих.
ru.ielts.faq_a2: С нуля: 6–12 месяцев. Intermediate: 3–6 месяцев. С 3 занятиями в неделю часто можно выйти на 6.5–7.0 за 4–6 месяцев.
ru.ielts.faq_a3: В Ташкенте, Самарканде, Бухаре, Фергане и других городах — в центрах British Council и IDP.
ru.ielts.faq_a4: В Узбекистане IELTS стоит примерно $200–220. Зарегистрироваться можно через British Council или IDP.
ru.sat.learn_desc: Math и EBRW (Reading, Writing) — все разделы SAT.
ru.sat.faq_q1: Чем отличается Digital SAT от PSAT?
ru.sat.faq_a1: SAT — основной экзамен (макс 1600). PSAT — тренировочный (макс 1520). PSAT может открыть путь к стипендиям National Merit.
ru.sat.faq_a2: В зависимости от цели: 3–9 месяцев. Поднять 1200 до 1400 часто занимает ~4–5 месяцев интенсивной подготовки. 3 занятия в неделю обычно достаточно.
ru.sat.faq_q3: Можно ли сдать SAT в Узбекистане?
ru.sat.faq_a3: Да. Можно сдавать в аккредитованных центрах College Board в Ташкенте. Экзамен проводится несколько раз в год.
ru.sat.faq_a4: Ограничений нет. Многие сдают 2–3 раза. Через Score Choice можно отправить лучший результат.
ru.profil.subject: Направление
ru.form.questions_hint: Отвечайте подробно — студенты увидят это в вашем профиле.
